name: clay-backend-plugin
description: Store, search, and analyze patterns across your Clay data. Import CSV/JSON exports and let Claude find insights across records.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key for embeddings (optional — falls back to local model)

WEBHOOK_PORT.description: Port for the webhook HTTP server (Clay sends data here)

WEBHOOK_API_KEY.description: API key to protect the webhook endpoint (local mode with ngrok)

REMOTE_URL.description: URL of hosted Clay backend service (e.g. https://your-app.railway.app). If set, plugin uses remote mode instead of local SQLite.

REMOTE_API_KEY.description: API key for the hosted service
